flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California Institute of the Arts fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 (61.4% → 41.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California Institute of the Arts rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 ($17.1k → $19.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at California Institute of the Arts fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (93.5% → 82.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California Institute of the Arts rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.5k → $59.0k).
